prompt: create an illustrated sketch of this image like the style we seen in 19th century books
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, transforming the photorealistic scanning electron micrograph of cells into a detailed, monochrome illustrated sketch. The visual style should meticulously emulate scientific illustrations found in 19th-century books, featuring precise line work, intricate shading through techniques like cross-hatching or stippling, and a generally illustrative, non-photorealistic aesthetic that accurately depicts the cellular structures present in the source image.
